package com.example;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.StringReader;
import java.io.StringWriter;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Optional;
import java.util.concurrent.ExecutionException;
import java.util.concurrent.ExecutorService;
import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
import java.util.concurrent.Future;

  @MyAnnotation(value = "demo", count = 1)
public class AllJava21Syntax implements Advanced {
    private static final int MAX = 100;
    private transient Object cache;
    private volatile int counter;
    private final List list;

    public AllJava21Syntax() {
        this.list = List.of("a", "b", "c");
    }
    public native void nativeMethod();
    public synchronized void syncMethod() {
    }
    public double strictAdd(double p0, double p1) {
        return (p2 + p0);
    }
    @SafeVarargs
    public final void varargsMethod(List<String>... p0) {
        List<String>[] p1 = p0;
        int p2 = p1.length;
        for (int p3 = 0; p3 < p2; p3++) {
            List<String> p5 = p1[p3];
            System.out.println(p5);
        }
    }
    public static Comparable max(Comparable p0, Comparable p1) {
        if (p0.compareTo(p1) <= 0) return p1;
        return p0;
    }
    public void literals() {
        int p0 = 1000000;
        int p1 = 175;
        double p2 = 3.141592653;
        float p5 = 0.001500000013038516f;
        int p6 = 65;
        int p7 = 1;
    }
    public String textBlock() {
        return """
        {
            "name": "Java 21",
            "features": ["records", "pattern matching", "virtual threads"]
        }
        """;
    }
    public void loops() {
        int[] p0 = { 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 };
        for (int p1 = 0; p1 < p0.length; p1++) {
            p0[p1] = (2 * p0[p1]);
        }
        int[] p1 = p0;
        int p2 = p1.length;
        for (int p3 = 0; p3 < p2; p3++) {
            int p5 = p1[p3];
            System.out.println(p5);
        }
      outer:
        for (int p1 = 0; p1 < 3; p1++) {
            p2 = 0;
            while (p2 < 3) {
                if (p1 == 1) {
                    if (p2 == 1) {
                        break outer;
                    }
                }
                if (p2 != 0) {
                    System.out.println(p1 + "," + p2);
                }
                p2 += 1;
            }
        }

        for (p1 = 0; p1 < 3; p1++) {
        }
        do {
            p1 += -1;
        } while (p1 > 0);
    }
    public void instanceOfPatterns(Object p0) {
        if ((p0 instanceof String)) {
            String p1 = ((String) p0);
            if (p1.length() > 5) {
                System.out.println(p1.toUpperCase());
            }
        }
         if (p0 instanceof Point(x, y)) {
            System.out.println((y + x));
        }
         if (p0 instanceof ColoredPoint(color, point)) {
            if ((point instanceof Point)) {
                int color = point.x();
                color = point.y();
                System.out.println(color + ":" + color + "," + color);
            }
        }
    }
    public String switchPattern(Object p0) {
        switch (p0) {
            case null -> "null";
            case String p3 -> {
                if (p3.isEmpty()) return "empty string";
            }
            case String p4 -> "string: " + p4;
            case Integer p5 -> {
                if (p5.intValue() > 0) return "positive int";
            }
            case Integer p6 -> "int: " + p6;
            case Point(x, y) -> {
                if (x == y) return "diagonal " + x;
            }
            case Point p10 -> "point " + p10;
            case Constant p11 -> "constant " + p11.value();
            case Add p13 -> "add";
            default -> "unknown";
        }

    }
    public double sealedSwitch(Shape p0) {

        return switch (p0) {
            case Circle p3 -> p3.area();
            case Rectangle p4 -> p4.area();
            case Polygon p5 -> p5.area();
            default -> throw new IllegalStateException("Unexpected value: " + p0);
        };

    }
    public int oldSwitch(int p0) {
        switch (p0) {
            case 1:
                return 10;
            case 2:
                return 20;
            default:
                return (2 * p0);
        }
    }
    public void exceptions() {
        try {
            throw new IOException("demo");
        } catch (IOException | RuntimeException e) {
            System.out.println(e.getMessage());
            System.out.println("finally");
        } finally {
            System.out.println("finally");
        }

        try {
            BufferedReader p0 = new BufferedReader(new StringReader("hello"));
            StringWriter p1 = new StringWriter();
            p1.write(p0.readLine());

        } catch (IOException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
    }
    public void lambdas() {
        java.util.function.Function p0 = String::length;

        java.util.function.Consumer p1 = System.out::println;
        java.util.function.Supplier p2 = () -> "hello";
        java.util.function.BiFunction p3 = (var a, var b) -> Integer.valueOf((b.intValue() + a.intValue()));
        java.util.function.Function p5 = (var a) -> a.toUpperCase();
        this.list.forEach(p1);
    }
    public void nestedClasses() {
        new AllJava21Syntax$1StaticLike(this).say();
        new AllJava21Syntax$1Inner(this).useOuter();
        System.out.println(new AllJava21Syntax$1Local(this).value);
        AllJava21Syntax$1 p0 = new AllJava21Syntax$1(this);
        p0.run();
    }
    public void virtualThreads() throws InterruptedException {
        Thread p0 = Thread.startVirtualThread(() -> System.out.println("virtual"));
        p0.join();
        try {
            ExecutorService p1 = Executors.newVirtualThreadPerTaskExecutor();
            Future p2 = p1.submit(() -> "result");
            System.out.println(((String) p2.get()));

        } catch (ExecutionException e) {
            throw new RuntimeException(e);
        }
    }
    public void unnamedPatterns(Object p0) {
         if (p0 instanceof Point(x, _)) {
            System.out.println("x=" + x);
        }

        switch (p0) {
            case Point(x, _) -> {
                System.out.println("x=" + x);
            }
            default -> {}
        }

        try {
            int p1 = Integer.parseInt("x");
        } catch (NumberFormatException _) {
            System.out.println("bad number");
        }
    }
    private String fetchUser() {
        return "Alice";
    }
    private Integer fetchOrder() {
        return 42;
    }
    public void generics() {
        List p0 = List.of(1, 2.0, 3L);
        List p1 = Arrays.asList(new Integer[]{ 1, 2, 3 });
        Optional p2 = Optional.empty();
        List p3 = List.of("x", "y");
    }
    public static void main(String[] p0) throws Exception {
        AllJava21Syntax p1 = new AllJava21Syntax();
        p1.literals();
        p1.loops();
        p1.instanceOfPatterns(new Point(1, 2));
        System.out.println(p1.switchPattern(new Point(3, 3)));
        System.out.println(p1.sealedSwitch(new Circle(5.0)));
        p1.exceptions();
        p1.lambdas();
        p1.nestedClasses();
        p1.virtualThreads();
        System.out.println(p1.textBlock());
    }
    private static String lambda$virtualThreads$1() throws Exception {
        return "result";
    }
    private static void lambda$virtualThreads$0() {
        System.out.println("virtual");
    }
    private static String lambda$lambdas$2(String p0) {
        return p0.toUpperCase();
    }
    private static Integer lambda$lambdas$1(Integer p0, Integer p1) {
        return Integer.valueOf((p1.intValue() + p0.intValue()));
    }
    private static String lambda$lambdas$0() {
        return "hello";
    }
}
